  
 
    
    
    These highlights do not include all the information needed to use COLUMVI ®  safely and effectively. See full prescribing information for COLUMVI.  
        COLUMVI (glofitamab-gxbm) injection, for intravenous use   Initial U.S. Approval: 2023

Hoffmann-La Roche AG

      
                            
                               
                            
                         
                      
                      
                         
                            
                         
                      
                   
                
                
                   
                      
                         
                         Columvi 
                         
                         
                            
                               Glofitamab 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               GLOFITAMAB 
                               
                                  
                                     
                                     GLOFITAMAB 
                                  
                               
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               HISTIDINE 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               HISTIDINE HYDROCHLORIDE MONOHYDRATE 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               METHIONINE 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               SUCROSE 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               
                            
                            
                               
                               POLYSORBATE 20 
                            
                         
                         
                            
                               
                               WATER
